chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI C.P.No.D-6324 of 2023 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGES For hearing of main case 07.05.2025 Mr. Parvaiz Ahmed Mastoi, AAG. ------- None present. No intimation is received. Same was the position on the last date of hearing. Accordingly, this petition is dismissed in non-prosecution. JUDGE JUDGE Hafiz
